# DriftSlider
> Lightweight, modular slider/carousel with physics-based touch for the web.

## Quick Start
npm install drift-slider

## Features
- 4 effects: slide, fade, coverflow, cards
- 9 optional modules: Navigation, Pagination, Autoplay, EffectFade, EffectCoverflow, EffectCards, Keyboard, A11y, ScrollAos
- Physics-based momentum scrolling
- jQuery plugin included
- TypeScript definitions
- <10KB gzipped core

## Links
- Docs: /getting-started.html
- API: /api.html
- Modules: /modules.html
- Demos: /demos.html
- Changelog: /changelog.html
